inputs.description:
Extract structured relationships using gpt-4.1-nano.

cd /home/hagaybar/projects/rare-books-bot
poetry run python -m scripts.enrichment.batch_wikipedia --pass 3 --db data/index/bibliographic.db --limit 2000

Verify:
  python3 -c "
import sqlite3
c = sqlite3.connect('data/index/bibliographic.db')
wconn = c.execute('SELECT count(*) FROM wikipedia_connections').fetchone()[0]
types = c.execute('SELECT source_type, count(*) FROM wikipedia_connections GROUP BY source_type').fetchall()
print(f'Connections: {wconn}')
for t, n in types: print(f'  {t}: {n}')
"
inputs.testCommand: cd /home/hagaybar/projects/rare-books-bot && python3 -c "import sqlite3; c=sqlite3.connect('data/index/bibliographic.db'); wconn=c.execute('SELECT count(*) FROM wikipedia_connections').fetchone()[0]; print(f'Connections: {wconn}')"
